scripts.preflight: npm run build:web && npm run typecheck
scripts.deploy:prod: npm run preflight && npm run build:wrangler-deploy && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.deploy.json --env prod
scripts.deploy:staging: npm run preflight && npm run build:wrangler-deploy && wrangler deploy --config wrangler.deploy.json --env staging
scripts.build:web: cd web && npm install && npm run build
scripts.migrate:prod: npm run build:wrangler-deploy && wrangler d1 migrations apply civicdoodie-parking-db-prod --remote --config wrangler.deploy.json --env prod
scripts.migrate:staging: npm run build:wrangler-deploy && wrangler d1 migrations apply civicdoodie-parking-db-staging --remote --config wrangler.deploy.json --env staging
scripts.generate:openapi: wrangler dev --port 8787 & PID=$!; sleep 3; curl -s http://localhost:8787/api/openapi.json | npx prettier --parser json > openapi.json; kill $PID
